INSERT INTO time_series SELECT generate_series(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 05:00:00', INTERVAL '1 hour');
CREATE TABLE events (event_time TIMESTAMPTZ, event_name VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 02:30:00', 'Event A'), (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 03:30:00', 'Event B');
SELECT e.event_name FROM events e JOIN (SELECT generate_series(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 05:00:00', INTERVAL '1 hour') as ts) g ON e.event_time = g.ts;
SELECT generate_series(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-31 23:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-02-01 00:30:00', INTERVAL '15 minutes') AS time_points;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT generate_series(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-02 00:00:00', INTERVAL '1 day') AS ts) AS generated_series;
CREATE TABLE bookings (booking_time TIMESTAMPTZ, booking_id INT);

INSERT INTO bookings (booking_time, booking_id) SELECT ts, seq FROM (SELECT generate_series(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-02-10 10:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-02-10 12:00:00', INTERVAL '1 hour') AS ts, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS seq) AS g;
SELECT b.booking_id FROM bookings b WHERE b.booking_time IN (SELECT generate_series(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-02-10 09:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-02-10 15:00:00', INTERVAL '30 minutes'));
SELECT e.event_name, g.ts FROM events e, generate_series(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 05:00:00', INTERVAL '1 hour') AS g(ts) WHERE e.event_time = g.ts;
